fixes_applied.original_issue: No tests for deny-propagation path or auto-approve bypass; only happy-path approval bridge tests existed.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added 5 new tests: deny_propagates_as_permission_denied (DenyInspector → AvaError::PermissionDenied), ask_without_bridge_propagates_as_permission_denied (Ask + no bridge → error), rejection_propagates_as_permission_denied (user rejects via bridge → error with reason), auto_approve_context_bypasses_bridge_for_allowed_tools (AllowInspector + auto_approve=true + no bridge → ok), after_passthrough (Middleware::after returns result unchanged).

fixes_applied.original_issue: Two LazyLock<Regex> statics (RE_DIFF_STAT, RE_ISSUE) used .unwrap() with no compile-time test; a malformed pattern would only panic at runtime.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added regexes_compile() test that forces LazyLock evaluation via .as_str() for both RE_DIFF_STAT and RE_ISSUE. Note: linter improved the test to use .as_str() (cleaner than &*); duplicate was removed.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Five LazyLock<Regex> statics (RE_SCRIPT, RE_STYLE, RE_BLOCK, RE_TAGS, RE_BLANK_LINES) used .unwrap() with no compile-time test.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added regexes_compile() test that forces evaluation of all 5 LazyLock<Regex> statics via .as_str().

fixes_applied.original_issue: RE_FILE_PATH LazyLock<Regex> used .unwrap() with no compile-time test.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added regexes_compile() test that forces evaluation of RE_FILE_PATH via .as_str().

fixes_applied.original_issue: BudgetTelemetry had zero test coverage despite being a non-trivial module with threshold alerting, cost accumulation, and label formatting logic.
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added 9 unit tests: observe_accumulates_cost, observe_emits_threshold_warnings (verifies 50% threshold fires), threshold_warnings_are_emitted_only_once (dedup guard), no_warnings_when_no_budget_set, budget_exhausted_when_over_limit, remaining_budget_none_when_no_limit, budget_status_label_with_limit, budget_status_label_without_limit, non_usage_events_do_not_accumulate_cost.

summary: Round 3 testing improvements: (1) permission_middleware.rs — added 5 new tests covering deny propagation, Ask-without-bridge fallback, user rejection, auto_approve bypass, and after() passthrough; (2) review.rs — added regexes_compile() test for RE_DIFF_STAT and RE_ISSUE LazyLock statics; (3) web_fetch.rs — added regexes_compile() test for 5 LazyLock<Regex> statics; (4) relevance.rs — added regexes_compile() test for RE_FILE_PATH; (5) budget.rs — added 9 unit tests for BudgetTelemetry covering cost accumulation, threshold warning dedup, exhaustion detection, and label formatting. All 17 new tests pass; cargo check and cargo test --workspace both clean.
